text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "The army was not forced to take any harsh or negative measures. Because there is cooperation, and thank God we are convinced, so is the military, and the authority is convinced. We said we want all of us…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: “They also want strife in another way. They are now starting to promote that there is a problem between Sunnis and Shiites.? Because there are displaced people in Sunni areas" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘军队没有被迫采取任何严厉或负面的措施。因为存在合作，感谢上帝，我们达成了共识，军方也是如此，当局也深信不疑。我们说过，我们希望我们所有人……’” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“他们还想以另一种方式制造纷争。他们现在开始宣扬逊尼派和什叶派之间存在问题？因为在逊尼派地区有流离失所者。” @wfwitness

text: Spot Brent rises to $132.46 and spot Oman rises to $139.08. Actual oil, not paper oil, is currently $130+ per barrel.
text_zh: 布伦特原油现货价格升至132.46美元，阿曼原油现货价格升至139.08美元。实际石油，而非纸面石油，目前价格为每桶130美元以上。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "The future will be difficult for you. Why, because reconstruction and return are two basic conditions for ending the aggression before anything else. All this will be rebuilt. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "The army was not forced to take any harsh or negative measures. Because there is cooperation, and thank God we are convinced, so is the military, and the authority is convinced. We said we want all of us to commit." @wfwitness

Why, because reconstruction and return are two basic conditions for ending the aggression before anything else. All this will be rebuilt. @wfwitness

text: WarMonitor RT @Acyn : Rev. James Martin: Yeah. I don't know too many doctors that have glowing hands. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043753037374869830/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @Acyn：詹姆斯·马丁牧师：是的。我不知道有太多手会发光的医生。https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043753037374869830/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor If that's what he saw, which is BS BTW, he has bigger problems upstairs than I thought. Reporter: Did you post that picture of yourself depicted as Jesus Christ? Trump: It wasn't a depiction. I did post it and I thought it was me as a doctor. And had to do with red cross as a red cross worker, which we support and only the fake news could come up with that one. https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 如果这就是他所看到的（顺便说一句，这是胡扯），那么他脑子里的问题比我想象的要大。记者：你发布了那张把自己描绘成耶稣基督的照片吗？特朗普：那不是描绘。我确实发布了它，我以为那是我作为一名医生。这与红十字会有关，作为一名红十字会工作人员，我们支持它，只有假新闻才会编造出那种说法。https://twitter.com/Acyn/status/2043731872757493835/video/1 - Acyn 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Brazilian media reports that ICE has arrested Brazil's former Intelligence Agency chief, Alexandre Ramagem Rodrigues, who fled Brazil to U.S. following ​his conviction ⁠for allegedly plotting ​a coup ​with ⁠former President Bolsonaro — Globo https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043751917755457736/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息：巴西媒体报道称，美国移民及海关执法局（ICE）已逮捕了巴西前情报局局长亚历山大·拉马根·罗德里格斯（Alexandre Ramagem Rodrigues）。他在因涉嫌与前总统博索纳罗密谋政变被定罪后逃往美国 — Globo https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043751917755457736/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel PM Netanyahu: “We have crushed the evil regime in Iran. I promised there would be no second Holocaust – and this year we fulfilled that promise.” “Europe has forgotten the distinction between good and evil. It is infected with deep moral weakness and is losing control of its identity.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 内塔尼亚胡总理：“我们已经粉碎了伊朗的邪恶政权。我承诺不会有第二次大屠杀——今年我们兑现了这一承诺。”“欧洲已经忘记了善恶之间的区别。它感染了深刻的道德软弱，正在失去对其身份的控制。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Secretary General: “We will not surrender. Will tackle the (Israeli) aggression” (So far, since Hezbollah entered the war, multiple Hezbollah towns have been taken by the IDF, approximately 1,500 Hezbollah members have been eliminated, and 6,400 Lebanese have been wounded.) tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 真主党秘书长：“我们不会投降。我们将应对（以色列的）侵略。”（到目前为止，自真主党参战以来，多个真主党城镇已被以色列国防军占领，约1500名真主党成员被消灭，6400名黎巴嫩人受伤。） 推文

text: ELINT News RT @ZeinakhodrAljaz : Hezbollah leader rejects Lebanon's direct negotiations with Israel and asks Lebanon to cancel Tuesday meeting with Israel #Lebanon tweet

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem calls on the Lebanese government to cancel Tuesday’s meeting with Israeli officials in Washington. Is that a threat? There is a clear risk that Lebanese politicians could be targeted. Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." Claims Hezbollah's intervention in the war prevented a surprise Israeli attack on Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆呼吁黎巴嫩政府取消周二在华盛顿与以色列官员的会议。这是一种威胁吗？黎巴嫩政客可能成为目标的风险很明显。真主党卡西姆在演讲中称：黎巴嫩政府的外交“没有带来任何结果”。声称真主党介入战争阻止了以色列对黎巴嫩的突然袭击。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Israel summoned Italy's ambassador over remarks criticizing Israeli operations in Lebanon. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 以色列因意大利大使批评以色列在黎巴嫩行动的言论而传唤了该大使。 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) REPORTER: Bishop Robert Barron says you owe Pope Leo an apology. Will you apologize? US PRESIDENT TRUMP: No, I don't, because Pope Leo said things that are wrong. He was very much against what I'm doing with regard to Iran, and you cannot have a nuclear Iran. Pope Leo would not be happy with the end result. You'd have hundreds of millions of people dead... I think he's very weak on crime. tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (War & Military News) 记者：罗伯特·巴伦主教说你欠利奥教皇一个道歉。你会道歉吗？美国总统特朗普：不，我不会，因为利奥教皇说的话是错误的。他非常反对我在伊朗问题上所做的事情，你不能拥有一个核伊朗。利奥教皇不会对最终结果感到高兴。你会让数亿人死亡……我认为他在打击犯罪方面非常软弱。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @StatWatch25 : 🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 Japan will conduct the first combat test of the Tomahawk missile from a destroyer This summer, the Japanese Navy plans to conduct the first training and combat launch of the Tomahawk cruise missile from the destroyer JS Chokai (DDG-176)in the eastern part of the Pacific Ocean with the support of the US Navy's 3rd Fleet. The event will be a key stage in Japan's transition to the concept of counterstrike and expanding its capabilities for long-range high-precision strikes. 🔷 The test will follow the delivery of the first batch of Tomahawk missiles in March, confirmed by Defense Minister S. Koizumi. The Atago-class destroyer JS Chokai has undergone modernization, including the adaptation of Mk.41 vertical launch systems (VLS), the upgrade of the combat information system, and integration with American targeting networks. The Tomahawk cruise missile (BGM-109 Tomahawk) has a range of over 1000–1300 km and is equipped with a warhead weighing about 450 kg, enabling high-precision strikes on protected targets. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @StatWatch25：🚀 🇯🇵 🇺🇸 日本将从驱逐舰上进行战斧导弹的首次战斗测试。今年夏天，日本海军计划在美军第三舰队的支持下，在太平洋东部从“鸟海”号驱逐舰（DDG-176）上进行战斧巡航导弹的首次训练和战斗发射。此次活动将是日本向反击概念转型并扩大其远程高精度打击能力的关键阶段。🔷 此次测试将在国防大臣小泉进次郎确认的3月份首批战斧导弹交付之后进行。爱宕级驱逐舰“鸟海”号已经进行了现代化改造，包括适配Mk.41垂直发射系统（VLS）、升级作战信息系统以及与美国目标网络集成。战斧巡航导弹（BGM-109 Tomahawk）射程超过1000–1300公里，配备约450公斤的弹头，能够对受保护目标进行高精度打击。 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "Diplomacy has not advanced even one step and the rate of Israeli aggression continues against Lebanon with American support." Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." text: OSINTdefender Engagement between the U.S. delegation and Iranian leaders has continued since this past weekend’s failed round of peace talks in Islamabad, officials tell CBS News, with one official stating that there has been “forward motion on trying to get to an agreement.” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043746757893308880/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News），自上周末在伊斯兰堡举行的和平谈判失败以来，美国代表团与伊朗领导人之间的接触仍在继续，一位官员表示，在“试图达成协议方面取得了进展”。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043746757893308880/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah’s Qassem in his speech: Lebanese government diplomacy "did not lead to anything." Claims Hezbollah's intervention in the war prevented a surprise Israeli attack on Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043746657976602892/photo/1 tweet

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ You are truly strange! By God, you do not fight, nor do you let anyone else fight; you do not resist, nor do you let anyone else resist. Go and look at the Israeli enemy everyone there is fighting”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“你们真是奇怪！看在上帝的份上，你们既不战斗，也不让别人战斗；你们既不抵抗，也不让别人抵抗。去看看以色列敌人，那里每个人都在战斗。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We won't let him settle. The resistance will live with terror, with its capabilities and methods, and it is not just a zero-sum engagement. Not just fighting on the border. It is a flying missile and all…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "The Israeli settlements in northern Palestine will not be safe, and if the Israelis enter any area of ​​Lebanon, they will demolish the homes to become barren land." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们不会让他安顿下来。抵抗力量将带着恐惧、能力和方法生活，这不仅仅是一场零和博弈。不仅仅是在边境战斗。它是飞行的导弹和所有……’” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“巴勒斯坦北部的以色列定居点将不再安全，如果以色列人进入黎巴嫩的任何地区，他们将拆毁房屋，使其成为荒地。” @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “This negotiation is an act of submission and surrender, and we call for a heroic stance to cancel it. Nations will then come running to you, and you will establish the use of elements of strength to confront the Israeli enemy and force it to implement the agreements”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“这次谈判是一种屈服和投降的行为，我们呼吁采取英雄般的立场来取消它。届时各国将奔向你们，你们将建立起利用力量要素来对抗以色列敌人并迫使其执行协议。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We will fight this enemy from behind him, to his right, and to his left. He will not know where the resistance will come from." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We won't let him settle. The resistance will live with terror, with its capabilities and methods, and it is not just a zero-sum engagement. Not just fighting on the border. It is a flying missile and all available means. Above all, resistance. Faith, will and ability" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们将从背后、右侧和左侧与这个敌人作战。他将不知道抵抗力量会从哪里来。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们不会让他安顿下来。抵抗力量将带着恐惧、能力和方法生活，这不仅仅是一场零和博弈。不仅仅是在边境战斗。它是飞行的导弹和所有可用的手段。最重要的是，抵抗。信仰、意志和能力。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "Yes, we are Karbala'is, Karbala'is, meaning we do not surrender to their humiliation, but rather we fight until martyrdom and victory occur, but martyrdom is martyrdom, and victory is for some people who…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We will fight this enemy from behind him, to his right, and to his left. He will not know where the resistance will come from." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘是的，我们是卡尔巴拉人，卡尔巴拉人意味着我们不屈服于他们的羞辱，而是战斗到殉难和胜利发生，但殉难就是殉难，胜利属于那些……的人’。” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们将从背后、右侧和左侧与这个敌人作战。他将不知道抵抗力量会从哪里来。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We are victorious from now on and at every moment, despite the great sacrifices. Victory" @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "Yes, we are Karbala'is, Karbala'is, meaning we do not surrender to their humiliation, but rather we fight until martyrdom and victory occur, but martyrdom is martyrdom, and victory is for some people who will be martyred." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：‘我们从现在起和每一刻都是胜利者，尽管做出了巨大的牺牲。胜利。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党秘书长纳伊姆·卡西姆：“是的，我们是卡尔巴拉人，卡尔巴拉人意味着我们不屈服于他们的羞辱，而是战斗到殉难和胜利发生，但殉难就是殉难，胜利属于那些将要殉难的人。” @wfwitness

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary General Sheikh Naim Qasem: “ We responded at the appropriate time and found that this was the right moment to proceed with implementing the agreement; it was then discovered that a massive aggressive plan had been prepared for Lebanon. We deprived the enemy of catching us by surprise and inflicting the very heavy losses that could have occurred. The enemy's goals are clear: to destroy the strength that Lebanon possesses as a prelude to "Greater Israel." For the record, all of Lebanon is targeted; when Israel occupies southern Lebanon, it means it is occupying Lebanon, and when it exerts pressure and spreads its killing across Lebanese territories, it means all of Lebanon is targeted. In the event of aggression, the Lebanese state is supposed to resist and task its army and forces to confront the aggression.”
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆：“我们在适当的时候做出了回应，并发现这是推进执行协议的正确时机；随后发现，一个针对黎巴嫩的大规模侵略计划已经准备就绪。我们剥夺了敌人突袭我们并造成可能发生的极其惨重损失的机会。敌人的目标很明确：摧毁黎巴嫩拥有的力量，作为‘大以色列’的前奏。记录在案，整个黎巴嫩都是目标；当以色列占领黎巴嫩南部时，意味着它正在占领黎巴嫩，当它施加压力并在黎巴嫩领土上散布杀戮时，意味着整个黎巴嫩都是目标。如果发生侵略，黎巴嫩国家理应进行抵抗，并指派其军队和部队对抗侵略。”

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah secretary General Naim Qassem: "This dilemma. Third, do not distort the facts. We are fighting a clear enemy, which strives with its aggression to occupy, kill civilians, and destroy life." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Secretary General Naim Qassem: "We are victorious from now on and at every moment, despite the great sacrifices. Victory" @wfwitness

Mohammad was martyred in direct clashes with invading Israeli forces in southern Lebanon Salute to this martyr that left this world with every ounce of dignity man can possibly possess. Never to humiliation!

No one has the right to take Lebanon to this path without the internal agreement of its components, and this did not happen. This is part of the concession." @wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Chinese Defense Ministry: ‘Chinese ships continue to move in and out of the waters of the Strait of Hormuz. We have trade and energy agreements with Iran, which we will respect and abide by. We expect others not to interfere in our affairs. Iran controls the Strait of Hormuz, and has opened it to us.’ tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 中国国防部：‘中国船只继续进出霍尔木兹海峡水域。我们与伊朗有贸易和能源协议，我们将尊重并遵守这些协议。我们期望其他人不要干涉我们的事务。伊朗控制着霍尔木兹海峡，并已向我们开放。’ 推文

text: Open Source Intel Former Brazilian intelligence chief Alexandre Ramagem has been arrested by ICE in the U.S. Ramagem fled Brazil in September after being convicted for plotting a coup with former President Jair Bolsonaro. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043745323231724010/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 前巴西情报局局长亚历山大·拉马根在美国被ICE逮捕。拉马根在因与前总统雅伊尔·博索纳罗密谋政变被定罪后，于9月逃离巴西。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043745323231724010/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel The naval blockade has been in full force for 3.5 hours. The IRGC had threatened it would began a harsh response, as well targeting the gulf ports. So far nothing. If they do not begin attacks, that may indicate that the regime has folded and will get back to the negotiating table. I still believe the gaps are extremely wide. They will need to give up the uranium, end terror proxy support and open up the strait. I’m feeling like the U.S. will get back to the negotiating table. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 海军封锁已全面实施3.5小时。伊斯兰革命卫队曾威胁要开始严厉回应，并瞄准海湾港口。到目前为止什么都没有发生。如果他们不开始攻击，这可能表明政权已经屈服，并将回到谈判桌。我仍然认为差距非常大。他们将需要放弃铀、结束对恐怖代理人的支持并开放海峡。我感觉美国将回到谈判桌。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to CBS News, engagement between the U.S. delegation and Iranian leaders has continued after the failed talks in Islamabad. ▪️ One official said there is “forward movement” toward reaching a potential agreement. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043744810264109181/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News）报道，美国代表团与伊朗领导人之间的接触在伊斯兰堡谈判失败后仍在继续。▪️ 一位官员表示，在达成潜在协议方面有“进展”。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2043744810264109181/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender District Judge Darrin P. Gayles, in a 17-page decision today, entirely dismissed a defamation lawsuit filed by U.S. President Donald J. Trump against the Wall Street Journal, Rupert Murdoch, CEO Robert Thomson and reporters Khadeeja Safdar and Joe Palazzolo, for their reporting on a creepy letter he purportedly wrote to commemorate the 50th birthday of convicted sex offender and trafficker Jeffrey Epstein in 2003. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 地区法官达林·P·盖尔斯（Darrin P. Gayles）在今天的一份17页裁决中，完全驳回了美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普对《华尔街日报》、鲁珀特·默多克、首席执行官罗伯特·汤姆森以及记者卡迪贾·萨夫达尔（Khadeeja Safdar）和乔·帕拉佐洛（Joe Palazzolo）提起的诽谤诉讼，原因是他们报道了他据称在2003年为纪念被定罪的性犯罪者和人口贩子杰弗里·爱泼斯坦（Jeffrey Epstein）50岁生日而写的一封令人毛骨悚然的信。 推文

text: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Despite Trump’s orders to impose a naval blockade on Iranian ports and prevent ships from entering/exiting Iranian ports, oil tankers are still loading oil in Iran and are leaving these terminals, without interruption. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 尽管特朗普下令对伊朗港口实施海军封锁并阻止船只进出伊朗港口，但油轮仍在伊朗装载石油并离开这些码头，没有中断。 @FotrosResistancee
